fields.Side: The side to get the data.
fields.PrimaryBlockedStream: The value interaction data currently being blocked. (Primary)
fields.SecondaryBlockedStream: The value interaction data currently being blocked. (Secondary)
fields.LaserActiveStream: The streamed data for this interaction.
fields.ShowLaserToOthersStream: Shows the laser data for the other stream.
fields.LaserTargetStream: Shows the value for the target of this interaction.
fields.GrabDistanceStream: Shows the data of the distance of this interaction.
